chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 433 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 09.09.2025 Ms. Rabia Bhatti, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Zameer Ahmed Ghanghro, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, requires that appropriate directions may be issued to the learned trial Court for expeditious proceedings. Learned Counsel for the complainant and learned Deputy Prosecutor General do not oppose the request so made. Accordingly, this bail application stands disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of two months hereof. J U D G E Abdul Basit
